name: agentbattler-bench
description: Public, replayable chess-agent harness benchmark proof loop

scripts.benchmark:model-suite: node bin/agentbattler.mjs run --manifest agents/model-suite/manifest.json --pairing all-pairs --output results/model-suite/matches --no-smoke
scripts.validate:pi-suite: node bin/agentbattler.mjs validate --manifest agents/pi-model-suite/manifest.json --positions benchmark/positions/v2.json --pairing cross-model
scripts.benchmark:pi-suite: AGENTBATTLER_CONCURRENCY=6 node bin/agentbattler.mjs run --manifest agents/pi-model-suite/manifest.json --positions benchmark/positions/v2.json --pairing cross-model --output results/pi-model-suite/matches --no-smoke
scripts.benchmark:claude-code-suite: AGENTBATTLER_CONCURRENCY=6 node bin/agentbattler.mjs run --manifest agents/claude-code-model-suite/manifest.json --positions benchmark/positions/v2.json --pairing cross-model --output results/claude-code-model-suite/matches --no-smoke
scripts.validate:harness-suite: node bin/agentbattler.mjs validate --manifest agents/harness-suite/manifest.json --positions benchmark/positions/v2.json --pairing cross-harness-all
scripts.benchmark:harness-suite: AGENTBATTLER_CONCURRENCY=6 node bin/agentbattler.mjs run --manifest agents/harness-suite/manifest.json --positions benchmark/positions/v2.json --pairing cross-harness-all --output results/harness-suite/matches --no-smoke
